name: SaaS / Cloud
description: B2B SaaS, enterprise cloud platforms, developer tools, cloud infrastructure providers. SOC 2 is the baseline trust signal. FedRAMP if pursuing federal.

conditional_frameworks.FedRAMP: If selling to US federal agencies
conditional_frameworks.CMMC: If handling CUI for defense contractors
conditional_frameworks.HIPAA: If storing or processing customer PHI (BAA required)
conditional_frameworks.GDPR: If serving EU customers or processing EU personal data

priority_control_families: Identity and access management (IAM, SSO, MFA)
Data classification and customer data isolation
required_artifacts: SOC 2 Type II report (or readiness assessment)
typical_gaps: No formal data classification — all data treated the same
Vendor list exists but no DPAs or security reviews
MFA enforced for admins but not all staff
Incident response plan exists but never tested
No separation between prod and non-prod environments
Dependency scanning not in CI/CD pipeline
No formal offboarding access revocation process
Availability SLAs defined but no DR plan to back them

document_patterns.policy_header: includes Trust Services Criteria reference if SOC 2 targeted
document_patterns.enforcement: references employment consequences and customer contract obligations
document_patterns.references: cites AICPA TSC criteria where relevant
